所有程序包的分层结构

程序包分层结构:
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.annotation,
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.exception,
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.web,
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.web.utils

类分层结构

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.xiaoyu.micro.web.ContextLoaderListener (implements jakarta.servlet.ServletContextListener)
    • org.xiaoyu.micro.web.FilterRegistrationBean
    • org.xiaoyu.micro.web.FreeMarkerViewResolver (implements org.xiaoyu.micro.web.ViewResolver)
    • jakarta.servlet.GenericServlet (implements java.io.Serializable, jakarta.servlet.Servlet, jakarta.servlet.ServletConfig)
      • jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServlet
        • org.xiaoyu.micro.web.DispatcherServlet
    • org.xiaoyu.micro.web.utils.JsonUtils
    • org.xiaoyu.micro.web.ModelAndView
    • org.xiaoyu.micro.web.utils.PathUtils
    • java.lang.Throwable (implements java.io.Serializable)
      • java.lang.Exception
        • java.lang.RuntimeException
          • org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.NestedRuntimeException
            • org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.ErrorResponseException
              • org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.ServerErrorException
              • org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.ServerWebInputException
    • org.xiaoyu.micro.web.WebMvcConfiguration
    • org.xiaoyu.micro.web.utils.WebUtils

接口分层结构

  • org.xiaoyu.micro.web.View
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.web.ViewResolver

Annotation Interface Hierarchy

  • org.xiaoyu.micro.annotation.Controller (implements java.lang.annotation.Annotation)
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.annotation.GetMapping (implements java.lang.annotation.Annotation)
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.annotation.PathVariable (implements java.lang.annotation.Annotation)
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.annotation.PostMapping (implements java.lang.annotation.Annotation)
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.annotation.RequestBody (implements java.lang.annotation.Annotation)
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.annotation.RequestParam (implements java.lang.annotation.Annotation)
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.annotation.ResponseBody (implements java.lang.annotation.Annotation)
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.annotation.RestController (implements java.lang.annotation.Annotation)
